items.summary: Signing ceremony of Research Framework Arrangement between the Joint Research Centre of the European Commission and the Ministry of Education and Research of the Republic of Moldova. Witnessed by Antonio COSTA, President of the European Council, Ursula VON DER LEYEN, President of the European Commission, and Maia SANDU, President of Moldova Signatories: Mihai POPSOI, Deputy Prime Minister, Minister of Foreign Affairs (MD), Bernard MAGENHANN, Director-General of the Joint Research Centre (EU) Letters of intent: 1. Moldova’s automotive sector Receiving: Dr. Holger FASTABEND, Managing Director, CEO, CTO of Gebauer & Griller Kabelwerke Gesellschaft m.b.H (Automotive Sector) By: Gert Jan KOOPMAN, Director General ENEST (EU) 2. MedTech and the development of an innovative ecosystem around Moldova HiTech Park Receiving: Doina NISTOR, Board President of the Moldova HiTech Park (MedTech Sector) By: Gert Jan KOOPMAN, Director General ENEST (EU)
